summary: Comprehensive testing of Location-based alarm PWA after 6 iterations of changes. Backend: 17/17 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. Unified AlarmBuilder with Start→Destination→Waypoint flow verified. Dashboard layout with trip cards and inline route stops working. All bottom nav drawers functional.

console_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility warning only

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/ - API root responds
BACKEND: GET /api/alarms - returns list
BACKEND: POST /api/alarms with trigger_mode='distance' - saves correctly
BACKEND: POST /api/alarms with trigger_mode='time', trigger_time=30 - saves correctly
BACKEND: PUT /api/alarms/{id} - updates alarm
BACKEND: DELETE /api/alarms/{id} - deletes alarm
BACKEND: GET /api/alarms/{id} - returns 404 for non-existent
BACKEND: GET /api/trips - returns list
BACKEND: POST /api/trips - creates trip
BACKEND: PUT /api/trips/{id} - updates trip
BACKEND: DELETE /api/trips/{id} - cascades delete to alarms
BACKEND: GET /api/trips/{id}/alarms - returns ordered alarms for trip
BACKEND: GET /api/geocode?q=Bangalore&lat=12.97&lon=77.59 - returns results with GPS bias
BACKEND: GET /api/reverse-geocode?lat=12.97&lon=77.59 - returns display_name
BACKEND: GET /api/alarm-history - returns list
BACKEND: POST /api/alarm-history - logs alarm trigger
BACKEND: Full trip creation flow (Bangalore→Kurnool→Hyderabad) with mixed trigger modes
FRONTEND: App loads with split layout (map ~42vh + dashboard panel)
FRONTEND: Empty state shows 'No alarms yet' message
FRONTEND: Click '+ New' → Builder opens with 'Where are you starting?' title
FRONTEND: 'Use Current Location' button IS visible on start step
FRONTEND: Search 'Bangalore' → select → 'Set Start' button works
FRONTEND: After setting start → 'Where are you going?' title appears
FRONTEND: 'Use Current Location' button is NOT visible on destination step
FRONTEND: Search 'Hyderabad' → select → switch to Time mode → 'Set Destination' works
FRONTEND: Trip visual shows 2 stops after setting destination
FRONTEND: Click 'Add Waypoint' → 'Add a stop' title appears
FRONTEND: 'Use Current Location' is NOT visible on waypoint step
FRONTEND: Search 'Kurnool' → select → 'Add Waypoint' inserts before destination
FRONTEND: Trip visual shows 3 stops with correct order
FRONTEND: Start row has gray dot, Waypoint has amber dot, Destination has green dot
FRONTEND: Only waypoint (Kurnool) shows X remove button
FRONTEND: Start and Destination do NOT have remove buttons
FRONTEND: Tap Start row (Bengaluru) → 'Edit Bengaluru' title opens
FRONTEND: Back button returns to trip visual
FRONTEND: Save Trip → success toast 'Trip with 3 stops created'
FRONTEND: Dashboard shows trip card 'Bangalore to Hyderabad'
FRONTEND: Trip card shows route stops inline with trigger badges
FRONTEND: Trip card edit icon → opens builder with 3 stops pre-filled
FRONTEND: Trip card delete icon → deletes trip
FRONTEND: Bottom nav Trips button → opens Trips drawer
FRONTEND: Bottom nav Alarms button → opens Alarms drawer
FRONTEND: Bottom nav + button → opens builder with 'Where are you starting?'
FRONTEND: Bottom nav History button → opens History drawer
FRONTEND: Bottom nav Location button → works (centers on user)
FRONTEND: Tracking toggle pill works (Off→On→Off)
FRONTEND: Map click → builder opens with reverse-geocoded location
FRONTEND: No console errors (only vaul accessibility warnings)
critical_code_review_comments: Vaul Drawer accessibility warnings: Consider adding aria-describedby attributes to silence accessibility warnings. Low priority.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test trips and alarms during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full app test completed after 6 iterations. All features verified working: (1) Unified AlarmBuilder with Start→Dest→Waypoint flow, (2) 'Use Current Location' only on start step, (3) Trip title format 'X to Y', (4) Trip visual dots (gray=Start, amber=Waypoint, green=Dest), (5) Remove X only on waypoints, (6) Dashboard layout with trip cards and inline route stops, (7) All CRUD APIs with trigger_mode/trigger_time. Key data-testids: builder-current-loc-btn, builder-confirm-btn, stop-row-{i}, remove-stop-{i}, builder-add-waypoint-btn, builder-save-btn, preview-trip-{id}, preview-edit-trip-{id}, preview-delete-trip-{id}.
